announcements.title: Join the TidyWL Discord 👥
announcements.message: We now have a Discord community for bug reports, feature requests, and general chat. The invite link never expires — come say hi: https://discord.gg/natc623GhX

announcements.title: What's New in v1.3.0
bullets: Filter by duration — Shorts, Under 5 min, 5–20 min, 20–60 min, Over 1 hour
Sort by duration (longest or shortest first)
Sort by published date (newest or oldest first)
Topic-breakdown auto-refresh after delete — no more stranded empty groups
Honest sort labels — "Date Added" renamed to "Playlist order" because YouTube doesn't expose per-video added-date timestamps on web

announcements.title: Testing - What's New in v1.2.0
bullets: Unavailable videos filter — find deleted, private, or region-locked videos cluttering your list
Drag-and-drop reordering, plus bulk Move to Top / Move to Bottom
Per-video action menu (open in tab, move, delete)
Open selected videos in new tabs
Hidden-count tooltip explaining why YouTube's total can exceed what TidyWL fetches

announcements.title: We have a new home: tidywl.com
announcements.message: TidyWL's landing page is now live at tidywl.com — bookmark it for quick access and share it with anyone whose Watch Later is out of control.
